data.title: Update fix-bug SKILL.md Step 7.5 to clarify discovered bugs must NOT use CLI_user tag
data.description:
## Implementation

In `plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md`, Step 7.5 (Anti-Pattern Scan), two points create bug tickets for discovered defects:
1. Line ~994: `If a batch returns batch_status: FAILED or PARTIAL, record findings as a bug ticket`

At each ticket-creation point in Step 7.5, add an explicit note:
"Do NOT use --tags CLI_user for these tickets — they are autonomously-discovered defects, not user-requested bugs. The CLI_user tag is reserved exclusively for bugs that a human explicitly asked the agent to file."

Also add a general constraint at the top of Step 7.5:
"CLI_user tag: Never apply --tags CLI_user to tickets created by this step. Anti-pattern discoveries are autonomous, not user-requested."

## TDD Requirement

RED eval task dfa9-5a6e must be completed first (establishes RED baseline). After this implementation, the eval test case added in dfa9-5a6e must PASS (GREEN).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py
- [ ] fix-bug SKILL.md Step 7.5 contains explicit CLI_user prohibition
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && grep -q "CLI_user" plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] Eval added in dfa9-5a6e now passes GREEN after SKILL.md update
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && .claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
